'''Grappa's yacht''' was the personal [[Starship/Legends|starship]] of [[Grappa (Hutt)|Grappa]] the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]], a crime lord allied with [[Black Sun/Legends|Black Sun]]. When Grappa killed [[Macus Kayniph]], a high-ranking member of Black Sun, in a fit of rage in [[11 ABY/Legends|11 ABY]], he reluctantly arranged the destruction of his yacht in order to cover up the murder.

{{Ship-stub}}
